metadata.notes: Merged from tier1, tier2, tier3 quantitative data. Derived metrics (YoY growth, CAGR, fee rates, valuation multiples) computed where raw inputs available. FY2024 is the primary reference period. For firms with non-calendar fiscal years (HLNE, STEP, ICG), the most recent comparable annual period is used.

MET-VD-002.missing_reason: GAAP EPS not collected or not applicable

MET-VD-008.missing_reason: organic growth decomposition not available from public sources for most firms

MET-VD-009.missing_reason: fundraising as % of AUM not standardized across universe

MET-VD-010.missing_reason: asset class breakdown not available for HHI computation

MET-VD-011.missing_reason: permanent capital percentage not disclosed or not collected

MET-VD-012.missing_reason: credit AUM percentage not separately confirmed

MET-VD-015.missing_reason: comp-to-revenue not collected at standardized level

MET-VD-016.missing_reason: insufficient data for fee rate calculation

MET-VD-017.missing_reason: performance fee share not standardized across universe

MET-VD-028.source: Calculated from market cap / FEAUM (approx EV)
